name: VTM NSS College, India
description: VTM NSS College is a distinguished government-aided arts and science institution affiliated to the University of Kerala, proudly established in 1964 by the Nair Service Society. Nestled in the serene locale of Dhanuvachapuram, Neyyattinkara, it offers a rich bouquet of programmes including BA, B.Sc., B.Com, MA, and M.Com — shaping well-rounded graduates for over six decades.
campus_student_life: Spread across a lush 19-acre campus, VTM NSS College boasts a well-stocked library, fully equipped science labs, open playgrounds, vibrant NSS and NCC units, a bustling canteen, and seamless Wi-Fi connectivity — making every day on campus an enriching experience.
